nasb.text: “Because of violence to your brother Jacob, You will be covered with shame, And you will be cut off forever.

esv.text: Because of the violence done to your brother Jacob, shame shall cover you, and you shall be cut off forever.

cnv.text: 因你對兄弟雅各行強暴， 你必受羞辱， 永被剪除。

ccb.text: “因你曾残暴地对待同胞兄弟雅各， 你必蒙羞，永遭毁灭。
